commands.review_summary:
Adds a Codex app-server `appServer.turnAssistantCompletionIdleTimeoutMs` plugin config key/schema/manifest UI hint and threads it into `runCodexAppServerAttempt`, with focused tests.

PR surface: Source +22, Tests +4. Total +26 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this PR exposes a new config path for an existing internal/direct runtime option. Source inspection verifies current main lacks plugin-config threading for this timeout.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers are contributor real-runtime proof, docs alignment, and maintainer acceptance of a new public config surface.

target.title: fix(codex): expose assistant completion idle timeout config
target.author: marchpure
